<!-- One sentence, plain English, max 25 words -->

## SKILL.md content

<!-- Paste your SKILL.md here -->

## Source URL (optional)

## Checklist
- [ ] My skill solves one specific problem
- [ ] The instructions are transparent and readable by the user
- [ ] No hidden behavior, prompt injection, or data exfiltration
- [ ] The skill_content is real, useful instructions (not a placeholder)
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
